inbox.title: Inbox

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.subtitle: Frequently asked questions and support
help.faqDmWindowQ: Why isn't the DM being sent to someone who commented?
help.faqDmWindowA: Instagram only allows a private reply/DM to be sent within 7 days of the comment. If that window has passed, the DM can't be sent — it's not a problem with your rule.
help.faqPrivateReplyFailedQ: The logs show "DM failed" — what should I do?
help.faqPrivateReplyFailedA: The Logs screen shows the exact reason: the DM window closed, the recipient is unreachable, or you hit a rate limit. If it says "this comment is too old", retrying won't help.
help.faqFreemiumQ: How much can I use on the free plan?
help.faqFreemiumA: The free plan lets you automate 1 post. For more, upgrade to Pro from Settings > Subscription.
help.faqButtonLimitQ: Why can I only add up to 3 buttons in a DM flow?
help.faqButtonLimitA: That's a limit of Instagram's own generic template message format — not a restriction we chose.
help.faqInstagramReconnectQ: There's a warning icon next to my Instagram account — what do I do?
help.faqInstagramReconnectA: Your Instagram access token may have expired. Tap "Reconnect" under Settings > Connected Instagram accounts to reauthorize.
help.faqAbTestA: When you enable A/B testing on a rule, each incoming match is randomly routed to variant A or B (50/50), and results are shown separately on the Rules screen.
help.faqDelayedMessageQ: When does a delayed message get sent?
help.faqDelayedMessageA: It's sent automatically once the number of hours you set has elapsed. If the 7-day DM window has closed by then, the message can't be sent.
help.faqBroadcastWindowQ: Does a broadcast message go to everyone?
help.faqBroadcastWindowA: No — per Instagram's rules, it's only sent to people you've messaged within the last 24 hours; otherwise Instagram treats it as a policy violation.

paywall.subtitle: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited rules, all posts, and AI-powered replies
